    void
    testDeleteNewlyEmptyFilesNoPS()
    Ensures that proof files are correctly deleted when they become empty and no PS file exists.
    void
    testDeleteNewlyEmptyFilesWithPS()
    Ensures that proof files are not deleted when they become empty if a PS file exists.
    void
    testEmpty()
    Ensures that purging with an empty input has no consequence on existing proofs.
    void
    testEmptyInput()
    Ensures that an empty input gives an empty result.
    void
    testEmptyPOFile()
    Ensures that it works well with an empty PO file.
    void
    testFileSimple()
    Simple test with a single file and three POs.
    void
    testHavePO()
    Ensures that the IllegalArgumentException is correctly raised.
    void
    testInexistentPOFile()
    Ensures that it works well when the PO file does not exist.
    void
    testMixingProjectsFiles()
    Ensures that it works well when the input is composed of both projects and files.
    void
    testRedundancyFiles()
    Ensures that redundant files are ignored.
    void
    testRedundancyProjects()
    Ensures that redundant projects are ignored.
    void
    testRedundancyProjectsFiles()
    When a file is selected as well as its enclosing project, ensures that no redundancy occurs in the output.
    void
    testSeveralFiles()
    Ensures that it works well when several input files are selected.
    void
    testSeveralProjects()
    Ensures that it works well when several input projects are selected.
